results.title: Iran may continue low-level uranium enrichment, Trump says
Britain to ban under 16s from social media
results.description: A representation image of a teenager using phone. — Reuters/File British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he would ban social media sites for the under-16s and impose restrictions on gaming and livestreaming platforms, in some of the most far-reaching online restrictions to date...

results.title: Peak oil demand arrives sooner than expected
results.description: Amid the disruptions caused by the US-Israeli-Iran war, countries have begun adapting to life with less oil.

results.title: WASHINGTON POST: Trump sought to break Iran’s regime. He settled for reopening Hormuz.
results.description: The agreement ends a costly war but leaves Iran’s leadership intact and its nuclear future still subject to negotiation
